- What changed:

## Scope discipline

- [ ] This PR is scoped to a single concern (RTL, sim, docs, or tooling) or clearly justified multi-area change.
- [ ] Unrelated diffs were removed.
- [ ] Branch is rebased/clean against target.

## Verification evidence (required)

- [ ] I ran relevant tests locally.
- [ ] I included exact commands used.
- [ ] I included pass/fail output summary.

### Commands run

```text
# one command per line
```

### Results

## Docs + protocol contract

- [ ] If protocol/register behavior changed, `docs/FCSP_PROTOCOL.md` was updated.
- [ ] If architecture wiring changed, `docs/SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md` and `docs/TOP_LEVEL_BLOCK_DIAGRAM.md` were updated.
- [ ] Absolute + relative address notation is preserved where applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages use subsystem prefix (`rtl:`, `sim:`, `docs:`, `build:`, `ci:`)
- [ ] No secrets/credentials added
- [ ] CI required checks pass
